permission_modes.meaning: The app may do this on its own; read-only or trivially reversible.
The app may propose this in the interface; nothing durable changes without the operator.
The action becomes a review packet in reviews/queue.json and waits for an explicit approve, revise, or reject.
The action cannot execute in V0 at all, regardless of approval.

actions.rule: Re-reading local state and the graph index is always safe; no durable write.
The daily brief is a proposal surface; it recommends one move and writes nothing.
Inspect source metadata already loaded by the app. No durable write.
Explain why a connection exists using visible evidence only.
Prepare a review packet targeting reviews/queue.json. Do not write memory or state directly.
Project, task, and routine state changes move through the review queue before promotion.
Memory claims are promoted only through an approved review packet; no automatic memory promotion in V0.
Anything leaving the machine (website publish, store submission copy, outbound messages) needs its own approved packet.
Raw sources are append-only truth; rewriting them is forbidden in V0.
Invoices, refunds, and any money movement stay outside the system until permissioning is proven.
Tester contact details are never read or written by the app in V0.
